etymology.description: semantic 戈(戈) (gē, "halberd") + phonetic 魏(魏) (wèi) -> sounding kuí, weapon type
etymology.interpretation: The character 戣(戣) (kuí, "halberd") combines the semantic component 戈(戈) (gē, "halberd") which directly refers to a type of weapon, with the phonetic component 魏(魏) (wèi) to provide the sound kuí. The character specifically denotes a kind of halberd, inheriting its physical association from the戈(戈) component.
